places.name: Athens
places.summary: The cradle of democracy and Western philosophy — marble temples, olive light, and 2,500 years of ideas.

places.name: København–Malmö
places.summary: Across the Øresund: four waves of urban regeneration — harbour reclamation, the climate / sponge city, and today's carbon, land-scarcity and ecological conflicts — plus the culture that fills it.

places.name: Mykonos
places.summary: An ecological reading of a rocky Cycladic island that survived on sun, air, sea, and Delos: the history and architecture of Chora and its hamlets.

places.name: Syros
places.summary: A time-sliced reconstruction of Syros: settlement displacement as a proxy for Aegean pacification — from hilltop citadel and piracy-refuge to open commercial port.
